mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dept_transfer_log (log_id, com_id, origin_dept_id, target_dept_id, emp_id, ai_recommended, ai_reason, handover_snapshot, created_by, created_at) VALUES (seq_dept_transfer_log.NEXTVAL, #{comId}, #{originDeptId}, #{targetDeptId}, #{empId}, #{aiRecommended}, #{aiReason}, #{handoverSnapshot}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE)
